changes.before: The road south smelled of wet leather, horse sweat, and grain dust that clung to Sylvanas whether wagons were in sight or not.
changes.after: The road south smelled of wet leather, horse sweat, and grain dust that clung to Sylvanas even out of sight of the wagons.

changes.before: Jaina built her own picture beside hers. Not the same picture. That was what made it useful.
changes.after: Jaina built her own picture beside hers. Not the same picture. That made it useful.

changes.before: Together they made Andorhal look less like a destination than a knot.
changes.after: Andorhal stopped looking like a destination and started looking like a knot.

changes.before: She did. Swiftly. Not translating downward anymore unless the books forced her to.
changes.after: She did. Swiftly. No simplifying now unless the books forced it.

changes.before: The yard master had been watching their faces instead of the books, which was sensible.
changes.after: The yard master had been watching their faces instead of the books.

changes.before: One hand still resting on the blotter as if he had been reaching for a pen.
changes.after: One hand still resting on the blotter beside a pen.

changes.before: Sylvanas looked at the body again and hated that the explanation improved it.
changes.after: Sylvanas looked at the body again and hated how much that helped.

changes.before: Somebody had reached into one office, one man, one moment, and closed a mouth before it could open.
changes.after: Somebody had reached into one office, one man, one moment, and closed a mouth before it opened.

changes.before: Ash fanned across the floor in a dark spill.
changes.after: Ash fanned across the floor.

changes.before: The sigil was partial but recognizable: formal, expensive, made for people who did not touch their own freight if they could pay others to do it.
changes.after: The sigil was partial but recognizable: formal, expensive, made for hands that paid other hands.

changes.before: So did abbreviated route names if you caught them in slant light.
changes.after: So did abbreviated route names in slant light.

changes.before: Making certainty out of scraps had killed better people than depot overseers.
changes.after: Making certainty out of scraps had killed better people than this overseer.

changes.before: Only enough men on the route to know when the wrong questions were being asked.
changes.after: Only enough men on the route to know when the wrong questions were asked.

changes.before: an upper room whose chief virtues were a bolt on the door and a table broad enough to lay evidence on
changes.after: an upper room with a bolt on the door and a table broad enough for evidence

changes.before: The innkeeper, roused half from bed, took one look at their faces and stopped trying to overcharge.
changes.after: The innkeeper, half out of bed, took one look at their faces and stopped trying to overcharge.

changes.before: Now she spoke into the page or into the air between them and assumed Sylvanas would keep up unless proved otherwise.
changes.after: Now she spoke into the page or the air between them and assumed Sylvanas would keep up unless proved otherwise.

changes.before: If Barov holdings keep turning up all through the grain road, then Andorhal matters more than before. ... The depots after this are just paper.
changes.after: If Barov holdings keep turning up across the grain road, then Andorhal matters more than before. ... The depots after this are paper.

changes.before: If I had to choose which surviving road they still trust, it would be the south feeder.
changes.after: If I had to choose, they still trust the south feeder.

changes.before: Across from her, Jaina was already revising the route list to match the same conclusion.
changes.after: Across from her, Jaina was already revising the route list to match it.

changes.before: Just details refusing to die properly: an empty wagon when grain ought to have weighed it down, cheap civility, the wrong kind of ease, the sense afterward that she had been offered something ordinary and forgotten it.
changes.after: An empty wagon when grain ought to have weighed it down. Cheap civility. The wrong kind of ease. The faint sense that she had been offered something ordinary and let it go.

changes.before: She hated being given reason to remember what she had not yet had reason to keep.
changes.after: She hated having reason to keep it now.

changes.before: On the table the roads narrowed until they stopped pretending to be separate things.
changes.after: On the table the roads narrowed toward one thing.

changes.before: At some point Sylvanas reached across for the tally sheet Jaina had just finished marking and found, a beat too late, that the name in her head had already changed.
changes.after: Sylvanas reached across for the tally sheet Jaina had just finished marking and found, a beat too late, that the name in her head had already changed.

changes.before: Only the useful fact of a hand she now recognized by work alone — the sharper pressure in the downstrokes when Jaina was tired, the neat corrections when a line had to be moved, the way she had abandoned softness in her script the same way she had abandoned it in speech once she understood Sylvanas needed none.
changes.after: Only the useful fact of a hand she now knew by work alone — sharper pressure in the downstrokes when Jaina was tired, neat corrections when a line had to move, the loss of softness in her script once she understood Sylvanas needed none.

changes.before: Her shoulder brushed Sylvanas's forearm by accident and stayed there only as long as the correction required.
changes.after: Her shoulder brushed Sylvanas's forearm by accident and stayed only as long as the correction required.

changes.before: Not whim. Not convenience. Evidence, hooves, the road turning south.
changes.after: Not whim. Not convenience. Evidence, hooves, the road turning south.

changes.before: Jaina corked the ink, flexed her cramped fingers once, and sat back in the chair with the stiffness of someone whose mind had forgotten the body for too long.
changes.after: Jaina corked the ink, flexed her cramped fingers once, and sat back stiffly, like someone whose mind had forgotten the body too long.

changes.before: Jaina gave her a look that suggested sleep was a suggestion she had no current interest in taking.
changes.after: Jaina gave her a look that said no.

observations.finding: Opening sensory line carried an unnecessary conditional tail.
observations.action: Cut it to keep the road smell immediate.

observations.finding: Jaina/Sylvanas contrast had one extra explanatory clause.
observations.action: Trimmed the last phrase and kept the contrast.

observations.finding: Andorhal summary read slightly writerly.
observations.action: Kept the knot image, tightened the setup.

observations.finding: Coaching-house arrival over-described the room's utility.
observations.action: Compressed to bolt plus evidence table.

observations.finding: Innkeeper entrance had filler around the same beat.
observations.action: Trimmed phrasing, kept the price-drop reaction.

observations.finding: Meta phrasing about Jaina 'translating downward' sounded editorial.
observations.action: Replaced with plainer in-scene 'simplifying.'

observations.finding: Narrator explained the yard master's reaction for the reader.
observations.action: Removed the gloss.

observations.finding: Single remaining as-if scaffold in a forensic description.
observations.action: Made the corpse detail concrete.

observations.finding: Forensic realization leaned a touch explanatory.
observations.action: Sharpened it into Sylvanas's tighter judgment.

observations.finding: Ash spill picked up a decorative extra beat.
observations.action: Cut it back to the useful image.

observations.finding: Seal analysis over-explained class behavior.
observations.action: Compressed it to a sharper Sylvanas phrasing.

observations.finding: Route-board recovery sentence could land faster.
observations.action: Removed the catch-them clause.

observations.finding: Maxim broadened away from the body in the room.
observations.action: Anchored it to this overseer.

observations.finding: Surveillance inference had one soft verbal extra.
observations.action: Tightened the sentence end.

observations.finding: Working-silence paragraph still had small sentence-fat.
observations.action: Trimmed the duplicate preposition.

observations.finding: Jaina's route summary had a few words of drag but no contamination.
observations.action: Compressed without flattening her analytic cadence.

observations.finding: Choice sentence explained itself twice.
observations.action: Cut it to the decision.

observations.finding: Conclusion sentence repeated what the scene already established.
observations.action: Removed the restatement.

observations.finding: Memory beat drifted abstract where concrete clues were stronger.
observations.action: Kept the clues, killed the float.

observations.finding: Road-map line leaned into mild inanimate agency.
observations.action: Grounded it in the narrowing evidence.

observations.finding: Name-shift trust beat had a little authorial scaffolding.
observations.action: Compressed while preserving the subtext.

observations.finding: Forearm contact beat carried one unnecessary phrase.
observations.action: Trimmed the tail and left the touch.

observations.finding: Jaina exhaustion beat explained body/mind split at length.
observations.action: Cut it shorter and kept the stiffness.

observations.finding: Full dialogue register scan found no clinical, bureaucratic, or report-language offenders in speech.
observations.action: Left intact; no contamination rewrite needed.

observations.finding: Re-checked the sharpest Jaina and subtext lines for false positives.
observations.action: Kept them; they read as character voice, not document voice.

flags: Line 409 kept — 'I would like to meet them in a room with the door shut' reads as Jaina's dry menace, not bureaucratic speech.
Line 451 kept — 'Used to the motion already. Or trusting it.' is a load-bearing Sylvanas trust beat.
Dialogue hunt checked every quoted exchange; no clinical or institutional register survived into speech.
